name: Remix: AURA OS v2.1
description: AURA OS — Adaptive Universal Response Agent Operating System. Mobile-first AI persona management shell powered by Google Gemini. Core features: Omega Persona Engine (dynamic generation, swipe carousel, 3D flip cards), real-time AI chat with persistent memory bank, contextual Suggestion Tags Explorer (Actualité, Science, Philosophie, SVT), dark glassmorphism UI optimized for iPhone 15.

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 — dark glassmorphism, electric violet #7C3AED + cyan #06B6D4
frontend.animations: Framer Motion — swipe carousel, 3D flip, micro-interactions

backend.ai: @google/genai — Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite (Chat) · Gemini 3.1 Pro (Engine) · cascade fallback across model versions
backend.performance: Edge Runtime pour les API IA, Streaming activé

omegaPersonaEngine.description: Dynamic persona generation via Gemini prompt compilation
omegaPersonaEngine.ui: Tinder-style swipe carousel + 3D flip card reveal

chatSystem.description: Conversational chain with mid-chat persona context injection
chatSystem.memory: Hierarchical storage: topics · preferences · session summaries per persona

suggestionTagsExplorer.input: Multi-select tag chips + free text input

uiUx.feedback: Haptic feedback sur swipes et interactions clés

pipelineKernel.description: Orchestration shell driven by Zustand PipelineStage — extendable to strict pipeline execution
